subject: [AAI] OOM AAI MODEL LOADER Fixed BabelClient
commit_message:
[AAI] OOM AAI MODEL LOADER Fixed BabelClient

Added a new property to enable/disable http for AAI BabelClient/AAIRestClient

Issue-ID: AAI-3533
Signed-off-by: Niharika Sharma <niharika.sharma@amdocs.com>
Change-Id: I2b43ed691101c48eff19f5c4ddb1e0beb1073a7e

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5917/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5917/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5917/ )
